author: Xavier John
name: Trellis Microservices (Project Tracker)
description: Multi-tenant microservices topology using Trellis: YARP gateway minting internal-network JWTs + Projects (operational, 403 cross-tenant) + Members (HR-sensitive, HideExistence -> 404). Aspire-orchestrated. Demonstrates tenant_id ABAC isolation, resource-based authorization, the v4 typed accessor (IAuthorizedResource), and the deny-overrides-allow JWT contract.

rootNamespace.description: Root namespace, derived from the -n parameter. Any characters that aren't valid C# identifier chars (letters, digits, underscore, dot) are replaced with underscores. Replaces 'ProjectTrackerTemplate' everywhere.

gatewayIssuerUrl.description: Issuer / audience prefix the gateway mints internal JWTs against. Defaults to the local Aspire-pinned gateway URL so the template runs zero-config. Override with your production gateway URL (e.g. https://gateway.internal) before deploying.
